data.title: Disrupting Childbirth Care: Why Birth Is Riskier Than Being a Fighter Pilot
data.description: For many years, women have been informed that childbirth injuries are a normal aspect of motherhood, treated as a silent expense of giving birth. Tracy MacNeal, the CEO of Maternal Medical, challenges this belief on Disruption Interruption. MacNeal is emphasizing the importance of addressing...

data.title: February 2026 Monthly Release
data.description: In Northbrook, Illinois, on March 19, 2026, The Allstate Corporation (NYSE: ALL) revealed approximate catastrophe losses of $140 million in February, translating to $111 million after-tax. The total catastrophe losses for the first two months of the year amounted to $315 million or $249 million after-tax.

data.title: Cyberify Unveils QuantumReady™
data.description: A recently launched AI-driven PQRaaS offering allows international banks to rapidly attain quantum-safe status within months, rather than years. Cyberify introduced QuantumReady™, a robust platform in WILTON, Conn., on March 19, 2026. This solution is tailored for enterprises and streamlines the shift from classical systems to quantum readiness.

data.title: URLgenius Surpasses 1B Shopper Sessions Routed into Top Commerce Apps, Driving an Estimated $6.8B in Commerce
data.description: In Madison, Wisconsin, URLgenius, a prominent mobile app linking and routing platform for brands, agencies, and commerce creators, disclosed impressive results for 2025. The exceptional performance was attributed to their focus on mobile-first strategies, increased adoption by creators, and growth in the URLgenius Marketplace. Throughout 2025, URLgenius directed a staggering 1 billion shopper sessions to leading commerce apps, resulting in an estimated $6.8 billion in commerce revenue. This success was particularly notable during peak shopping seasons, with Q4 seeing 350 million shopper sessions routed through URLgenius.

data.title: Alacrity Solutions Invests in AI to Strengthen Claims Performance for Insurance Carriers at PLRB 2026
data.description: In Fishers, Indiana, Alacrity Solutions, a prominent insurance claims management service provider in North America, revealed a substantial technology investment aimed at enhancing claims performance for insurance companies. This investment backs an intelligence-driven operational approach focused on simplifying procedures, effectively handling increased workload, ensuring real-time quality management, and providing more consistent outcomes - particularly during surges. This move is part of the company's commitment to enhancing their services for their clients.

data.title: Q4 Brings Digital Conferencing to its IR Platform — Modernizing Earnings Calls and Improving Event Performance
data.description: In Toronto, Q4 Inc. unveiled Digital Conferencing features in its AI-powered IR Ops software, aimed at enhancing earnings calls and investor events. This new capability streamlines the management of conferencing in a singular platform, aiding firms in bolstering operational efficiency, minimizing technical challenges, and enhancing communication reliability during pivotal occasions. Highlighting the necessity of up-to-date infrastructure, Q4 emphasizes the importance of managing the complete conferencing process seamlessly for companies looking to optimize their interactions with shareholders.

data.title: Ethereum's price falls to $2,100, raising long squeeze risk. Over $2.5B in long liquidations possible below $2,000, with $1,800 support at risk.
data.description: The potential for significant volatility in Ethereum has put at risk over $2.5 billion in long liquidations below the $2,000 mark. This could potentially result in a retest of the $1,800 support level.

data.title: SecureIQLab Finds 62-Point Gap in Cloud Firewall Security Across 12 Vendors
data.description: A recent independent study conducted by SecureIQLab in Austin, Texas, tested the effectiveness of 12 advanced cloud firewalls against over 4,500 cyber attacks. This testing took place on identical AWS infrastructure. The results of the study, known as ACFW CyberRisk Validation 2.0, were published and compared the performance of these firewalls.

data.title: 49% of CTV Ads Are Still Traditional TV Spots - And That's a Huge Missed Opportunity According to TripleLift
data.description: In the bustling market of connected TV advertising, a significant discrepancy persists despite the record-breaking numbers. While streaming services are witnessing an all-time high in viewership, and advertising spending is skyrocketing, the industry predominantly clings to antiquated formats. This reliance on age-old methods is hindering the potential for brands to capitalize on a substantial impact worth billions. As of March 19, 2026, in New York, the shift towards streaming has marked a milestone by surpassing conventional TV viewing. The untapped opportunities in connected TV advertising underscore the need for a modernized approach to maximize brand exposure and engagement.

data.title: EVA Live Inc.’s Revenues Surge 82.6% to $17M as Company Swings to $8.1M Net Income
data.description: Los Angeles, California - EVA Live, Inc. revealed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year concluded on December 31, 2025. The report signifies a noteworthy transition for EVA Live, Inc. as it experienced substantial progress in revenue generation, a broader client base, and a significant shift towards profitability during the stated fiscal year. Additionally, the company, listed as Nasdaq: GOAI, a pioneer in artificial intelligence-based digital advertising and automation, is based out of Los Angeles, California.

data.title: Tejon Ranch Co. Board Intends to Include Shareholder Special Meeting Right Proposal for Consideration at the 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: Tejon Ranch Company has announced its plan to introduce a proposal for a Shareholder Special Meeting Right at the upcoming 2026 Annual Meeting. This proposal will allow shareholders to convene a special meeting by vote, highlighting the company's commitment to shareholder engagement. The initiative is set to be a significant development for shareholders as it aims to enhance their ability to have a say in important decisions. This proposal underscores the company's dedication to corporate governance and transparency. Shareholders will have the opportunity to vote on this proposal during the upcoming annual meeting.

data.title: QuSecure Banking Deployment Spotlighted in Proposed SEC Post-Quantum Financial Infrastructure Framework as Real-World Proof for Post-Quantum Migration
data.description: In San Mateo, California, QuSecure's implementation of post-quantum cryptography (PQC) in collaboration with Banco Sabadell and Accenture has been recognized by the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) as the leading example for industry-wide adoption strategies. This achievement marks a significant milestone in the banking sector’s efforts to enhance security measures against quantum threats.
